title: Magic Flowers Mod
description: A mod that adds flowers with magic abilities.
body:
A mod that **adds** new magic flowers to minecraft.
(Fly faster with your elytra - configurable)

![All the flowers!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c536f42f0cce7ab79a6247119039395884a6adfa.png)

Tutorial at [https://www.dailymotion.com/video/x9kyp2a](https://www.dailymotion.com/video/x9kyp2a).

All flowers are found in configured_feature flower_default & flower_plain for example plains.

New **items** and how to **obtain** them:
- neza elita flower -> found in the plains biome
- ragmela oro flower -> found in the plains biome
- sole ochio flower -> found in the plains biome
- sganasce bon flower -> found in the plains biome

Items **uses**:
- neza elita flower -> Removes all bad effects
- ragmela oro flower -> Launches you in the air(Use with caution & troll your friends)
- sole ochio flower -> Boosts you while flying with the elytra
- sganasce bon flower -> **Detects** players and shows youre movement **speed**(**sneek** right click)

It's possible to configure the fly speed boost & the launch height.

You can place the flowers by sneeking and right clicking.

If you want the source code, just send me a message.

Feel free to use in modpacks.
